see_evidence: SQLAlchemy/Clean Architecture: commit once at end if all succeeds; rollback once on failure
Python os.replace: atomic promotion on POSIX — write to temp, replace atomically
CI/CD 2025: build once in staging, verify, then promote same artifact — deploys should be boring
phases_implemented: P-1_TOOL_ROUTE_GUARD — blocks canmore/image_gen/broad_api_discovery; validates execution path
P0_PREFLIGHT — validates root, boot_ready, heavy work class against enum
P2_WRITE_OUTPUTS — writes to staging only; supports content_json, content_text, copy_from
P3_VERIFY — SHA256 verifies all staged outputs before promotion
P4_PROMOTE — atomic promotion via shutil.copy2 + os.replace
P5_COMMIT — conditional: git commit if available; COMMIT_DEFERRED_RECEIPT if not
P6_UPDATE_STATE — updates baseline pointer + stage state ledger; accepts commit SHA or deferred ref

validation_tests.test: full lifecycle P-1→P7 with real file output
forbidden execution path blocks at P-1
invalid heavy work class blocks at P0
dry-run stops after P0, no staging dir

new_capabilities: CAPABILITY: Autonomous P-1→P7 stage execution — ChatGPT no longer needs manual sub-commands per stage
CAPABILITY: Fail-closed at every phase — blocked receipt written before any mutation on failure
CAPABILITY: Staging root isolation — no active root mutations before P4 verify passes
CAPABILITY: Atomic file promotion — os.replace ensures no partial writes reach active tree
CAPABILITY: Git-optional pipeline — stages complete cleanly in sandbox with deferred receipt
CAPABILITY: Heavy work class enforcement — stages blocked at P0 if class not in enum
CAPABILITY: Request-file interface — stage plans can be pre-written as JSON and replayed
chatgpt_deployment: Run dry-run validation: python transactional_stage_runner_v1.py --stage-name TEST --heavy-work-class PROOF --dry-run
Expected: DRY_RUN_PASS with P-1 and P0 both PASS
